messages.content: USING HIERARCHY 翻译一下
使用层次结构化

Another unique property of IC layouts is the explicit reuse of
sub-blocks in the form of instantiated hierarchy. The majority of
the time spent in creating a texture tile comes from visiting each
rectangle in that tile. This time can be reduced if the instantiated
sub-blocks are pre-rasterized such that iterating over their rectangles is unnecessary. 翻译一下
IC布局的另一个独特特性是以实例化层次结构的形式明确地重用子块。创建纹理瓷砖的大部分时间花费来自于访问该瓷砖中的每个矩形。如果实例化的子块被预先光栅化，那么遍历它们的矩形就是不必要的，这可以减少时间的消耗。
没有看懂这句话，解释一下
这句话在讲IC布局的一个特点，即使用实例化层次结构来明确地重复使用子块。在制作纹理瓷砖时，最耗费时间的部分是访问每个矩形，这个过程需要反复进行。如果可以事先将已经重复使用的子块预先保存下来，那么就不需要再进行这个繁琐的过程，从而节省时间。

A hierarchy cache is a block of preallocated memory that is used
to store pre-rasterized versions of heavily used sub-designs. Each
pre-rasterized sub-design will be a complete mipmap for that subdesign. These mipmaps do not need to be tiled texture pyramids,
because their data will never be used directly by the graphics implementation. It will merely be copied into the main design’s tiled
texture pyramid as needed. 翻译一下
层次结构缓存是一块预分配的存储器，用于存储经常使用的子设计的预光栅化版本。每个预光栅化的子设计将成为该子设计的完整mipmap。这些mipmap不需要成为瓦片纹理金字塔，因为它们的数据永远不会直接被图形实现使用。只要需要，它们将被简单地复制到主设计的瓦片纹理金字塔中。

翻译一下：How does one select which sub-designs out of the whole design
to pre-rasterize? The cells with the highest number of instantiations are preferred since this maximizes the utility of the cache.
In the case that two sub-designs are instantiated the same number
of times, the larger sub-design is taken because it will cover more
area in the base layout. Once this ranking has been established, a
method is needed to select which of the sub-designs to pre-rasterize
since the hierarchy cache is of finite size. The steps are:
如何选择整个设计中哪些子设计需要进行预光栅化呢？优先选择实例化次数最高的单元格，因为这样可以最大化缓存的效用。如果两个子设计实例化的次数相同，则选择更大的子设计，因为它将在基本布局中覆盖更多的区域。一旦建立了这种排名，需要选择哪些子设计进行预光栅化，因为层次缓存是有限的。具体步骤如下：

翻译一下：1. Compute the instance count for each sub-design and rank
them from highest to lowest.
2. Walk down this ranked list and mark sub-designs as being
pre-rasterized, subtracting the memory cost of pre-rasterizing
them from the available size of the hierarchy cache. Continue walking down the ranked list until the available hierarchy cache memory is depleted. Note that sub-designs are
merely marked for pre-rasterization; no computation is actually done at this point.
3. Visit all the sub-designs that were marked as being pre-rasterized and determine whether all instances of its parent are
also going to be pre-rasterized. If so, there is no need to prerasterize this design since its parent will be pre-rasterized.
In this case, mark the design as not being pre-rasterized and
return its memory allocation to the available hierarchy cache
pool.
4. Go back to step 2 and continue to select the highest ranked
sub-designs until the hierarchy cache is depleted again or terminated when an iteration yields no change.
5. Finally, create mipmaps for all sub-designs that were marked
for pre-rasterization.

1. 计算每个子设计的实例数，并从高到低排名。
2. 按照此排名列表进行遍历，将子设计标记为预先光栅化，从层次结构缓存的可用大小中减去其预先光栅化的内存成本。继续向下遍历排名列表，直到可用的层次结构缓存内存耗尽。请注意，子设计仅被标记为预先光栅化；此时不做任何计算。
3. 访问所有标记为预先光栅化的子设计，并确定其父代的所有实例是否也将被预先光栅化。如果是这样，则无需对该设计进行预光栅化，因为其父代将被预光栅化。在这种情况下，请将设计标记为不进行预光栅化，并将其内存分配返回到可用的层次结构缓存池中。
4. 回到步骤2，继续选择排名最高的子设计，直到层次缓存再次耗尽或者迭代没有变化时终止。
5. 最后，为所有标记为预先光栅化的子设计创建mipmap。

翻译一下：This process pushes the selection of sub-designs as far up the hierarchy as the size of the hierarchy cache will allow. The case is
allowed where the main design can fit into the hierarchy cache.
This occurs when the size of the design is small and simply means
that the entire layout will be pre-rasterized.
The format of the pre-rasterized hierarchy data is the same as the
coverage map information described in Section 5.2. The data needs
to be kept as coverage map information so that correct compositing
can be done when the texture tiles are created.

这个过程将子设计的选择向层次结构的顶部推进，直到层次结构缓存的大小允许。如果主设计可以适应层次结构缓存，这种情况是允许的。当设计的大小很小时，这种情况很常见，这意味着整个布局都将被预先光栅化。
预光栅化的层次结构数据的格式与第5.2节中描述的覆盖映射信息相同。数据需要保留为覆盖映射信息，以便在创建纹理瓷砖时进行正确的合成。

翻译一下：Regardless of how well the algorithms described in the previous
sections are implemented, there will still be a finite amount of time
to create the necessary texture tiles. This time delay can cause a
stutter in the responsiveness of an end application. To mitigate this
delay, a multi-threaded approach is taken. One thread renders the
texture tiles on the display while one or more threads are tasked
with creating the tiles. Since a tiled approach was chosen, and each
texture tile is completely independent of any other, N “creator”
threads can be used to achieve at most N speedup, if N processors
are available on the host platform
无论前面的算法描述实现得多好，创建必要的纹理瓦片仍需要一定的时间。这种时间延迟可能会导致最终应用的响应速度减慢。为了减轻这种延迟，采用了多线程的方法。一个线程在屏幕上渲染纹理瓷砖，而一个或多个线程则负责创建这些瓷砖。由于选择了瓦片化方法，且每个纹理瓷砖完全独立于其他纹理瓷砖，因此可以使用N个“创建者”线程来实现最多N倍的加速（如果主机平台上有N个处理器）。

翻译一下：In the case where the drawing thread does not have all of the
texture tiles available to it, it can look farther up in the pyramid for
another texture tile that covers the same area. A tile found higher
up in the pyramid will be a coarser view of the desired area, but
it is better to draw a fuzzier view of the layout than nothing at all.
Note that since the top part of the pyramid is pre-computed, some
coarser view of the entire layout will always be available for use.
The result of this multi-threaded approach is that, as the viewpoint changes very quickly, the layout may become fuzzy because
the necessary texture tiles have not yet been created. As the viewpoint remains constant, and the necessary tiles are created, the image refines itself.

如果绘制线程没有所有纹理瓷砖可用，它可以在金字塔的更高处寻找另一个覆盖相同区域的纹理瓷砖。在金字塔高处找到的瓷砖将是所需区域的模糊视图，但是画出布局的模糊视图总比什么都不画要好。请注意，由于金字塔的顶部部分是预先计算的，因此始终可以使用布局的某个粗略视图。这种多线程方法的结果是，当观点变化非常快时，布局可能变得模糊，因为必要的纹理瓷砖尚未被创建。当观点保持恒定，并且必要的瓷砖被创建时，图像会变得更加清晰。

翻译一下：The system described was implemented by modifying the Magic
Layout System [5]. The OpenGL [3] graphics library was used to
render the designs. For the rest of the the paper, this implementation will be called “glLayoutView.”
Experiments were run to compare the performance of glLayoutView, the Magic Layout System (version 6.5a), and two popular
commercial tools, A and B. Both commercial tools are from major
companies in the VLSI design industry. Tool A is primarily used as
a layout editor, while tool B is intended for viewing large designs.
The test platform was a Sun Microsystems Ultra 60 workstation
with two 450 MHz UltraSparcII processors, 2GBs of main memory, and an Expert3D [1] graphics card. The operating system was
Solaris 2.7, and the version of OpenGL was 1.2.1

本文所描述的系统是通过修改魔术布局系统[5]来实现的。采用OpenGL [3]图形库来渲染设计。在接下来的篇章中，这种实现方法被称为“glLayoutView”。
进行了一系列实验，比较了glLayoutView、魔术布局系统（版本6.5a）和两个流行的商业工具A和B的性能。这两个商业工具都来自于VLSI设计行业的主要公司。A工具主要用作布局编辑器，而B工具旨在用于查看大型设计。测试平台是Sun Microsystems Ultra 60工作站，配备两个450 MHz UltraSparc II处理器、2GB主存储器和Expert 3D [1]显卡。操作系统是Solaris 2.7，OpenGL的版本是1.2.1。

Two designs were compared: a design with substantial hierarchy,
SU Block, and a design with no hierarchy, Flash. Table 1 gives the
statistics for the two designs. 翻译一下
比较了两个设计：一个具有大量层次结构的设计SU块，和一个没有任何层次结构的设计Flash。表1给出了这两个设计的统计数据。
